currency-cache-lore: Cache is a high-tier currency, usually obtained by AFK farming in the Memory Converter, where 1024 units of Memory can be converted into 1 unit of Cache, or by completing high-level stages.
currency-memory-lore: Memory is a common currency in Terminal Ark, typically dropped in stages.
equipped-item-notice: This item is equipped and cannot be locked or destroyed. Unequip it first to perform these actions.
item-wasteland-scavenge-lore: Venture beyond the platform and explore the nearby wasteland—you might uncover supplies left behind.
resonance-storage-expansion-core-descrip: [Storage Material] An advanced storage core for expanding inventory and vault slots.
resonance-storage-expansion-core-lore: Multiple expansion cores resonating in sync, holding far greater capacity than the sum of their parts.
storage-expansion-core-description: [Storage Material] A refined storage core for expanding inventory and vault slots.
storage-expansion-core-lore: Compressed storage fragments bound into a stable expansion core.
storage-fragment-description: [Storage Material] Used to expand inventory and vault slots.
storage-fragment-lore: A small block of reclaimed storage medium, salvaged and reformatted for reuse.
void-storage-expansion-core-description: [Storage Material] The top-tier storage core for expanding inventory and vault slots.
void-storage-expansion-core-lore: Storage folded through void space, containing capacity that should not fit within its physical shell.
